title: Trump Threatens Iran Strike: warns of ‘Stone Age’ hit; consulate cites ancient civilisation
summary_full: President Trump warned Iran would be hit "extremely hard" in the coming weeks, aiming to return the nation to the "Stone Age." This aggressive rhetoric follows ongoing hostilities and a shift in US stated goals, drawing sharp criticism from Iran's consulate in Mumbai. The consulate highlighted Iran's ancient heritage, asserting its existing greatness.
